historical_notes: Supplementary biography of Yi: Fei Gong became an attendant in the Imperial Secretarial Office, and his name was know to all in the land. He died at a young age.

Fei Gong 費恭
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Fei Gong (費恭). Noted throughout the land but died young. Fei Gong was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom.
